title: తీయని మాటల గుట్టు
moral: తీయని మాటలు మాత్రమే కాదు, కొన్నిసార్లు చేదు నిజాలు కూడా మనకు మంచి చేస్తాయి కదూ?
main_character: Tenali Ramakrishna. A lean, quick-witted man in his late 30s, with a mischievous twinkle in his eyes and a neatly trimmed mustache. He often wears simple, yet elegant, off-white dhotis and kurtas, sometimes with a colorful turban. Always the same character across every scene.
antagonist: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene.
setting: The grand court of Vijayanagara, Hampi, during a warm, sunny afternoon. The court is filled with ornate pillars, colorful tapestries, and the soft rustle of silk garments. Same location across every scene.

scenes.text: విజయనగర సామ్రాజ్యం సభలో, ఇద్దరు వ్యాపారులు తమ గొడవను రాజు ముందు పెట్టారు. తెనాలి రామకృష్ణుడు ముందుకు వచ్చి, తన తెలివైన మాటలతో, ఆ చిక్కుముడిని విడదీశాడు — అందరూ ఆశ్చర్యపోయారు. రాజు కృష్ణదేవరాయలు, ఆ పెద్ద హాలు అంతా ప్రతిధ్వనించేలా, గట్టిగా నవ్వేశాడు. "ఆహా! రాముడా, నీ తెలివికి సరిలేరు!" అంటూ రాజు తన సింహాసనంపై తల వెనక్కి వేశాడు. తెనాలి ముఖంపై చిన్న నవ్వుతో నిలబడగా, రాజు చూపులు ప్యాలెస్ తోటల వైపు మళ్ళాయి — ఏదో కొత్త ఆలోచన మొలకెత్తుతున్నట్లు.
scenes.image_prompt: The king throws his head back on his throne, laughing loudly as the hall echoes. The advisor stands with a small smile on his face, while the king's gaze drifts towards the palace gardens. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. Bright afternoon sun streaming through high arched windows, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air, creating a warm and lively atmosphere in the court.
scenes.scene_visual: The king throws his head back on his throne, laughing loudly as the hall echoes. The advisor stands with a small smile on his face, while the king's gaze drifts towards the palace gardens.
scenes.text_te_en: Vijayanagara Saamraajyam Sabhalo, Iddaru Vyaapaarulu Tama Godavanu Raaju Mundu Pettaaru. Tenaali Raamakrrishnudu Munduku Vachchi, Tana Telivaina Maatalato, Aa Chikkumudini Vidadishaadu — Andaru Aashcharyapoyaaru. Raaju Krrishnadevaraayalu, Aa Pedda Haalu Antaa Pratidhvaninchelaa, Gattigaa Navveshaadu. "Aahaa! Raamudaa, Ni Teliviki Sarileru!" Antu Raaju Tana Sinhaasanampai Tala Venakki Veshaadu. Tenaali Mukhampai Chinna Navvuto Nilabadagaa, Raaju Chupulu Pyaales Totala Vaipu Mallaayi — Edo Kotta Aalochana Molakettutunnatlu.
scenes.text_en: In the court of the Vijayanagara Empire, two merchants brought their dispute before the King. Tenali Ramakrishna stepped forward and, with his clever words, untangled the knot — everyone was amazed. King Krishnadevaraya laughed loudly, his laughter echoing through the large hall. "Oh! Ramu, your wisdom is unmatched!" the King said, leaning back on his throne. As Tenali stood with a small smile on his face, the King's gaze turned towards the palace gardens — as if a new idea was sprouting.

scenes.text: రాజు ఆలోచనలో పడిపోయి, ఒక్కసారిగా లేచి నిలబడ్డాడు. "నా రాజ్యంలో ఇకనుండి కేవలం తీయని మాటలు, సువాసనగల పువ్వులు మాత్రమే ఉండాలి!" అంటూ తన చేతులు గంభీరంగా ఊపాడు. అప్పుడే తెచ్చిన మల్లెపూల దండల తీయని సువాసన, కోర్టులో నిండిపోయింది — అది కొద్దిగా మరీ ఎక్కువగా అనిపించింది. కటువైనది ఏదీ తన రాజ్యంలో ఉండకూడదని రాజు ఆజ్ఞాపించాడు. తెనాలి కళ్ళు కొద్దిగా సన్నబడ్డాయి, చిన్న ఆలోచన మెరిసినట్లుగా... మిగిలిన సభలోని వాళ్ళంతా ఒకరినొకరు చూసుకుంటూ, కొద్దిగా ఆందోళనగా నిలబడ్డారు.
scenes.image_prompt: The king suddenly stands up from his seat, grandly waving his hands as he makes a decree. The advisor's eyes narrow slightly, as if a small thought has sparked, while other courtiers exchange anxious glances. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. The afternoon light slightly dimmed as clouds briefly pass, casting a momentary shadow over the court, creating a hint of unease despite the king's pronouncement.
scenes.scene_visual: The king suddenly stands up from his seat, grandly waving his hands as he makes a decree. The advisor's eyes narrow slightly, as if a small thought has sparked, while other courtiers exchange anxious glances.
scenes.text_te_en: Raaju Aalochanalo Padipoyi, Okkasaarigaa Lechi Nilabaddaadu. "Naa Raajyanlo Ikanundi Kevalam Tiyani Maatalu, Suvaasanagala Puvvulu Maatrame Undaali!" Antu Tana Chetulu Gambhirangaa Upaadu. Appude Techchina Mallepula Dandala Tiyani Suvaasana, Kortulo Nindipoyindi — Adi Koddigaa Mari Ekkuvagaa Anipinchindi. Katuvainadi Edi Tana Raajyanlo Undakudadani Raaju Aajnyaapinchaadu. Tenaali Kallu Koddigaa Sannabaddaayi, Chinna Aalochana Merisinatlugaa... Migilina Sabhaloni Vaallantaa Okarinokaru Chusukuntu, Koddigaa Aandolanagaa Nilabaddaaru.
scenes.text_en: The King, lost in thought, suddenly stood up. "From now on, only sweet words and fragrant flowers should be in my kingdom!" he declared, waving his hands grandly. The sweet scent of freshly brought jasmine garlands filled the court — it felt a little too much. The King commanded that nothing harsh should exist in his kingdom. Tenali's eyes narrowed slightly, as if a small idea had sparked... The rest of the court members looked at each other, standing a little worried.

scenes.text: రాజు ఆజ్ఞ విన్న తెనాలి, తన ప్యాలెస్ తోటను కేవలం తీయని వాసన వచ్చే పువ్వులతో నింపడం మొదలుపెట్టాడు. తోటలో ఎటు చూసినా గులాబీలు, సంపెంగలు, మల్లెలు — వాటి సువాసన గాలిని బరువుగా, కొద్దిగా అసహ్యంగా మార్చేసింది. తెనాలి తన తోటలో నడుస్తూ, "ఆహా, ఈ మల్లెల సుగంధం ఎంత మధురం! కటువైన వాసన లేని పువ్వులు మాత్రమే నా ఉద్యానవనంలో ఉండాలి" అన్నాడు, అతని కళ్ళలో ఏదో మెరుపు. సేవకులు అయోమయంగా చూస్తూ, తీయని వాసన వచ్చే పువ్వులనే నాటారు. రాజు ముఖ్య సలహాదారుడు ఈ వింత ప్రవర్తనను రాజుకు తెలియజేశాడు — రాజు గడ్డం నిమురుకుంటూ, ఆలోచనలో పడిపోయాడు.
scenes.image_prompt: The advisor walks through his palace garden, which is now filled exclusively with sweet-smelling flowers like roses, champak, and jasmine. A distinct glint is visible in the advisor's eyes as servants look on in confusion, planting only fragrant blooms. Early morning light, soft and golden, illuminating Tenali's garden, making the vibrant flowers glow, yet Tenali's expression holds a hint of mischief in the gentle glow.
scenes.scene_visual: The advisor walks through his palace garden, which is now filled exclusively with sweet-smelling flowers like roses, champak, and jasmine. A distinct glint is visible in the advisor's eyes as servants look on in confusion, planting only fragrant blooms.
scenes.text_te_en: Raaju Aajnya Vinna Tenaali, Tana Pyaales Totanu Kevalam Tiyani Vaasana Vachche Puvvulato Nimpadam Modalupettaadu. Totalo Etu Chusinaa Gulaabilu, Sampengalu, Mallelu — Vaati Suvaasana Gaalini Baruvugaa, Koddigaa Asahyangaa Maarchesindi. Tenaali Tana Totalo Nadustu, "Aahaa, I Mallela Sugandham Enta Madhuran! Katuvaina Vaasana Leni Puvvulu Maatrame Naa Udyaanavananlo Undaali" Annaadu, Atani Kallalo Edo Merupu. Sevakulu Ayomayangaa Chustu, Tiyani Vaasana Vachche Puvvulane Naataaru. Raaju Mukhya Salahaadaarudu I Vinta Pravartananu Raajuku Teliyajeshaadu — Raaju Gaddam Nimurukuntu, Aalochanalo Padipoyaadu.
scenes.text_en: Hearing the King's command, Tenali began filling his palace garden only with sweet-smelling flowers. Everywhere in the garden, there were roses, champaka, and jasmine — their fragrance made the air heavy and a little unpleasant. Tenali walked through his garden, saying, "Ah, how sweet is the scent of these jasmines! Only flowers without any harsh smell should be in my garden," with a twinkle in his eyes. The servants, looking confused, planted only sweet-smelling flowers. The King's chief advisor informed the King about this strange behavior — the King stroked his beard, lost in thought.

scenes.text: తెనాలి ప్రతిరోజూ సభకు వచ్చి, కేవలం పొగడ్తలు, తీయని మాటలు మాత్రమే చెప్పడం మొదలుపెట్టాడు. రాజు సింహాసనంపై తన పట్టు చీరలు కదల్చుకుంటూ, అసౌకర్యంగా కదిలాడు. "రాముడా, నీ మాటలు వినసొంపుగా ఉన్నా, వాటిలో ఏమాత్రం సారం కనిపించడం లేదు!" అంటూ రాజు నుదుటిపై ముడతలు పడ్డాయి. రాజ్య సమస్యలపై తెనాలి ఏమాత్రం ఉపయోగకరమైన సలహా ఇవ్వలేదు. తెనాలి మాత్రం శాంతంగా, ముఖంపై నిశ్చలమైన చిరునవ్వుతో నిలబడ్డాడు. రాజు కంఠంలో నుండి ఒక పెద్ద నిట్టూర్పు వెలువడింది — అతని కోపం స్పష్టంగా కనిపించింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The king shifts uncomfortably on his throne, his silk robes rustling, as he listens to the advisor's empty praises. A deep sigh escapes the king's throat, revealing his clear anger, while the advisor maintains a calm, unwavering smile on his face. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. Mid-morning light, bright and clear, but the king's brow is deeply furrowed, casting a small, angry shadow over his face, reflecting his growing irritation.
scenes.scene_visual: The king shifts uncomfortably on his throne, his silk robes rustling, as he listens to the advisor's empty praises. A deep sigh escapes the king's throat, revealing his clear anger, while the advisor maintains a calm, unwavering smile on his face.
scenes.text_te_en: Tenaali Pratiroju Sabhaku Vachchi, Kevalam Pogadtalu, Tiyani Maatalu Maatrame Cheppadam Modalupettaadu. Raaju Sinhaasanampai Tana Pattu Chiralu Kadalchukuntu, Asaukaryangaa Kadilaadu. "Raamudaa, Ni Maatalu Vinasompugaa Unnaa, Vaatilo Emaatram Saaram Kanipinchadam Ledu!" Antu Raaju Nudutipai Mudatalu Paddaayi. Raajya Samasyalapai Tenaali Emaatram Upayogakaramaina Salahaa Ivvaledu. Tenaali Maatram Shaantangaa, Mukhampai Nishchalamaina Chirunavvuto Nilabaddaadu. Raaju Kanthanlo Nundi Oka Pedda Nitturpu Veluvadindi — Atani Kopam Spashtangaa Kanipinchindi.
scenes.text_en: Every day, Tenali came to the court and began speaking only praises and sweet words. The King shifted uncomfortably on his throne, rustling his silk robes. "Ramu, though your words are pleasant to hear, they lack any substance!" the King said, wrinkles appearing on his forehead. Tenali offered no useful advice on kingdom problems. Tenali, however, stood calmly with a serene smile on his face. A big sigh escaped the King's throat — his anger was clearly visible.

scenes.text: ఇప్పుడు ప్యాలెస్ అంతా తీయని పువ్వుల సువాసనతో నిండిపోయింది — గాలి బరువెక్కి, శ్వాస తీసుకోవడం కూడా కష్టంగా మారింది. రాజు తల పట్టుకొని, అసహ్యంగా తన చేతిని ఊపాడు. "ఈ సువాసన... నా తల పగిలిపోతున్నట్లుంది! మధురమైనవి కూడా కొన్నిసార్లు భరించరానివి!" అంటూ రాజు అసహనంగా అన్నాడు. తెనాలి మాత్రం ప్రశాంతంగా, ఏదో తెలిసినట్లుగా నవ్వుతూ చూస్తున్నాడు. చిన్నపాటి రాజ్య సమస్యలు కూడా పరిష్కారం కాకుండా మిగిలిపోయాయి. ఒక్కసారిగా అందరి చూపులు అతని వైపు తిరిగాయి — తెనాలి ముందుకు అడుగు వేశాడు.
scenes.image_prompt: The king holds his head and waves his hand in disgust, overwhelmed by the heavy, sweet fragrance filling the palace. The advisor watches calmly with a knowing smile, then steps forward as all eyes turn towards him. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. A hazy, almost suffocating light filtering through the palace, the air thick with perfume, making the scene feel slightly oppressive despite the bright sun outside.
scenes.scene_visual: The king holds his head and waves his hand in disgust, overwhelmed by the heavy, sweet fragrance filling the palace. The advisor watches calmly with a knowing smile, then steps forward as all eyes turn towards him.
scenes.text_te_en: Ippudu Pyaales Antaa Tiyani Puvvula Suvaasanato Nindipoyindi — Gaali Baruvekki, Shvaasa Tisukovadam Kudaa Kashtangaa Maarindi. Raaju Tala Pattukoni, Asahyangaa Tana Chetini Upaadu. "I Suvaasana... Naa Tala Pagilipotunnatlundi! Madhuramainavi Kudaa Konnisaarlu Bharincharaanivi!" Antu Raaju Asahanangaa Annaadu. Tenaali Maatram Prashaantangaa, Edo Telisinatlugaa Navvutu Chustunnaadu. Chinnapaati Raajya Samasyalu Kudaa Parishkaaram Kaakundaa Migilipoyaayi. Okkasaarigaa Andari Chupulu Atani Vaipu Tirigaayi — Tenaali Munduku Adugu Veshaadu.
scenes.text_en: Now the entire palace was filled with the scent of sweet flowers — the air became heavy, and it was difficult to breathe. The King held his head and waved his hand in disgust. "This scent... it feels like my head is splitting! Even sweet things can sometimes be unbearable!" the King said impatiently. Tenali, however, watched calmly, smiling as if he knew something. Even small kingdom problems remained unsolved. Suddenly, everyone's gaze turned towards him — Tenali stepped forward.

scenes.text: తెనాలి రాజు వైపు చూస్తూ, మెల్లగా నవ్వాడు. "మహారాజా," అన్నాడు, "తీయని మాటలు మాత్రమే వింటే, చేదు నిజాలు తెలియవు. చేదు నిజాలు లేని జీవితం, సుగంధం లేని పువ్వు లాంటిది." ఆ చప్పని మాటల్లో ఎంత లోతైన అర్థం ఉందో రాజుకు ఒక్కసారిగా అర్థమైంది. మీకు తెలుసా? ఆ క్షణంలో సభలో ఒక్కసారిగా నిశ్శబ్దం అలుముకుంది — అందరూ ఊపిరి బిగబట్టారు. రాజు కళ్ళు పెద్దవిగా అయ్యాయి, అతని ముఖంపై ఒక గొప్ప జ్ఞానం మెరిసింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The advisor smiles gently at the king, who stands before him. The king's eyes widen dramatically, and a profound understanding dawns on his face as the entire court holds its breath in silence. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. A single shaft of sunlight pierces through a high window, landing directly on Tenali as he speaks, highlighting his wisdom, while the king's face is initially shadowed, then illuminated by understanding.
scenes.scene_visual: The advisor smiles gently at the king, who stands before him. The king's eyes widen dramatically, and a profound understanding dawns on his face as the entire court holds its breath in silence.
scenes.text_te_en: Tenaali Raaju Vaipu Chustu, Mellagaa Navvaadu. "Mahaaraajaa," Annaadu, "Tiyani Maatalu Maatrame Vinte, Chedu Nijaalu Teliyavu. Chedu Nijaalu Leni Jivitan, Sugandham Leni Puvvu Laantidi." Aa Chappani Maatallo Enta Lotaina Artham Undo Raajuku Okkasaarigaa Arthamaindi. Miku Telusaa? Aa Kshananlo Sabhalo Okkasaarigaa Nishshabdam Alumukundi — Andaru Upiri Bigabattaaru. Raaju Kallu Peddavigaa Ayyaayi, Atani Mukhampai Oka Goppa Jnyaanam Merisindi.
scenes.text_en: Tenali looked at the King and smiled softly. "Your Majesty," he said, "if we only hear sweet words, we won't know the bitter truths. A life without bitter truths is like a flower without fragrance." The King suddenly understood how deep the meaning was in those simple words. Do you know? At that moment, silence fell over the court — everyone held their breath. The King's eyes widened, and a great wisdom shone on his face.

scenes.text: రాజు కృష్ణదేవరాయలు సింహాసనం నుండి లేచి, తెనాలి వైపు నడిచాడు. అతని ముఖంపై నిజమైన చిరునవ్వు వెలిగింది. "రాముడా, నువ్వు నాకు గొప్ప పాఠం నేర్పావు. చేదు నిజాలు కూడా రాజ్యానికి అవసరం!" అంటూ రాజు కృతజ్ఞతగా అన్నాడు. వెంటనే, అన్ని రకాల పువ్వులను తిరిగి ప్యాలెస్‌కు తీసుకురావాలని ఆజ్ఞాపించాడు. ఇప్పుడు ప్యాలెస్‌లో తీయని, ఘాటైన పువ్వుల సువాసనలు కలిసి, ఆహ్లాదకరమైన వాతావరణం ఏర్పడింది — ఒక అందమైన సమతుల్యత. తెనాలి రాజుకు వినయంగా తల వంచాడు.
scenes.image_prompt: The king rises from his throne and walks towards the advisor, a genuine smile lighting up his face. The advisor bows his head respectfully as the king expresses his gratitude. Also in this scene: King Krishnadevaraya. A majestic and powerful ruler in his 40s, with broad shoulders and a regal bearing. He has a dignified beard and wears elaborate silk robes in deep jewel tones, adorned with gold and precious stones, and a magnificent crown. Always the same character across every scene. Gentle dusk light, warm amber, washing over the court, creating a peaceful and harmonious atmosphere, symbolizing balance and wisdom.
scenes.scene_visual: The king rises from his throne and walks towards the advisor, a genuine smile lighting up his face. The advisor bows his head respectfully as the king expresses his gratitude.
scenes.text_te_en: Raaju Krrishnadevaraayalu Sinhaasanam Nundi Lechi, Tenaali Vaipu Nadichaadu. Atani Mukhampai Nijamaina Chirunavvu Veligindi. "Raamudaa, Nuvvu Naaku Goppa Paatham Nerpaavu. Chedu Nijaalu Kudaa Raajyaaniki Avasaran!" Antu Raaju Krritajnyatagaa Annaadu. Ventane, Anni Rakaala Puvvulanu Tirigi Pyaales‌Ku Tisukuraavaalani Aajnyaapinchaadu. Ippudu Pyaales‌Lo Tiyani, Ghaataina Puvvula Suvaasanalu Kalisi, Aahlaadakaramaina Vaataavaranam Erpadindi — Oka Andamaina Samatulyata. Tenaali Raajuku Vinayangaa Tala Vanchaadu.
scenes.text_en: King Krishnadevaraya rose from his throne and walked towards Tenali. A genuine smile lit up his face. "Ramu, you have taught me a great lesson. Bitter truths are also necessary for the kingdom!" the King said gratefully. Immediately, he commanded that all kinds of flowers be brought back to the palace. Now, in the palace, the sweet and strong scents of flowers blended together, creating a pleasant atmosphere — a beautiful balance. Tenali bowed respectfully to the King.

quality_scores.notes: This story boasts a compelling narrative arc and nearly flawless grammar, making it a strong foundation. However, it reads more like a formal written account than a warm, oral bedtime story, which impacts its authenticity and emotional resonance. To reach an award-worthy level, the primary focus should be on infusing a more conversational tone and consistently showing emotions through character actions and dialogue, rather than stating them directly.

moral_te_en: Tiyani Maatalu Maatrame Kaadu, Konnisaarlu Chedu Nijaalu Kudaa Manaku Manchi Chestaayi Kadu?
moral_en: Not just sweet words, but sometimes bitter truths also do us good, don't they?
topic: తెనాలి రాముడు రాజుకు పాఠం నేర్పిన కథ
